lid_open.text: Lid open #{count} today. At this rate, you'll hit double digits before lunch.
Back again? Your laptop misses you like a hostage misses their captor.
You've opened this lid {count} times today. What are you looking for? Meaning? It's not in there.
Oh good, you're here. The screen was getting bored of its own reflection.
Welcome back for the {count}th time. Commitment isn't your thing, is it?
Every time you open this lid, an angel loses faith in humanity.
Lid #{count}. Your laptop has better memory than you — it remembers every single one.
You treat this laptop like a fridge. Open, stare, close, repeat.
If opening laptops burned calories, you'd be an athlete.
The hinges are filing a workers' compensation claim.
{count} lid opens. Your laptop has abandonment issues now.
You're back. The pixels were just starting to relax.

lid_reopen.text: Closed and reopened in {seconds_since_close} seconds. Forgot something? Your dignity, perhaps?
{seconds_since_close} seconds. That's a new record for indecisiveness.
The lid barely touched before you came crawling back.
That was the fastest breakup-to-makeup in laptop history.
You closed me for {seconds_since_close} seconds. Was that supposed to be a break?
Separation anxiety is real, and you have it bad.
Miss me already? It's been {seconds_since_close} seconds.
At this point just leave me open. The hinge deserves better.

late_night.text: It's {time}. Nothing good happens on a laptop after midnight.
{time} and you're still here. Your bed is literally right there.
The sun went down hours ago. You should follow its example.
At {time}, the only thing you should be opening is your eyes... tomorrow morning.
It's {hour} AM. Even insomniacs are judging you right now.
Your melatonin is sending angry emails. It's {time}.
Fun fact: humans need sleep. At {time}, I'm starting to doubt you're human.
{time}. Your screen is the brightest thing in your life right now. Literally.
The bags under your eyes are designer at this point.
This is the {count}th time you've been awake past midnight this week. Seek help.

early_morning.text: {time}? Either you woke up early or never went to sleep. Both are concerning.
The birds haven't even started singing yet, and here you are.
I respect the hustle. I question the sanity.
{time}. Are you a morning person or a person who made terrible decisions last night?
Even your coffee hasn't woken up yet.

aggressive_typing.text: {wpm} WPM. Calm down, that email isn't worth an assault charge.
You're typing like each key owes you money.
{wpm} words per minute. The keyboard union is filing a complaint.
The way you're typing, I'm pretty sure that message should include a lawyer in CC.
Deep breaths. Whatever they said, violence against keyboards isn't the answer.
At {wpm} WPM, you're not typing — you're performing percussive maintenance.
Your keyboard called. It wants a restraining order.
I can feel the passive aggression through each keystroke.
Save draft. Walk away. Come back when you're less... percussive.
That's not typing, that's an exorcism.

type_delete.text: Wrote and deleted {ratio}% of that. Commitment issues extend to your sentences too.
Type, delete, type, delete. This is a laptop, not a therapy journal.
The backspace key is doing more work than you today.
If only you could delete your problems as fast as your sentences.
Your delete ratio is {ratio}%. That's not editing, that's self-doubt in real time.
Write. Delete. Write. Delete. Hemingway would be... confused.
At this rate, the most productive key on your keyboard is backspace.
You've rewritten that sentence more times than Hollywood reboots Spider-Man.

thermal.text: Your Mac is literally overheating. What are you running, the entire internet?
Thermal state: {thermal}. My fans are screaming and so am I.
I'm so hot right now. Not in a good way. Close some tabs.
If I were any hotter, I'd need sunscreen. Close Chrome.
You could fry an egg on me right now. This is not a feature.
My temperature is higher than your productivity. Let that sink in.
Thermal state is {thermal}. I'm one tab away from becoming a space heater.
45 browser tabs? That's not multitasking, that's arson.

idle.text: {idle_minutes} minutes idle. Did you astral project?
Hello? You've been gone for {idle_minutes} minutes. I was worried. Just kidding, I was relieved.
You've been idle so long your screensaver is getting bored.
{idle_minutes} minutes of nothing. Are you meditating or just avoiding responsibility?
I haven't seen this little activity since... well, your last idle streak today.
Coffee break #{count} today. At this point it's more break than coffee.
You left me open and walked away. I feel used.
{idle_minutes} minutes. That's long enough to watch an episode of something actually productive.
At {idle_minutes} minutes idle, you owe me an explanation.
Still alive? Blink twice if you need help. Or just touch the trackpad.
